canonical_name: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (Puducherry)

local_names.ta: முதலமைச்சர் முழு நல மருத்துவக் காப்பீட்டுத் திட்டம் (புதுச்சேரி)
local_names.pa: ਮੁੱਖ ਮੰਤਰੀ ਵਿਆਪਕ ਸਿਹਤ ਬੀਮਾ ਯੋਜਨਾ (ਪੁਡੂਚੇਰੀ)
local_names.en: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (Puducherry)

income_thresholds.description: Families with annual income below Rs 72,000 get completely free enrollment and Rs 5 lakh coverage. Priority enrollment for BPL families.
All Puducherry residents with income up to Rs 5 lakh are eligible. Higher income families may need to pay nominal contribution for enrollment.

exclusion_rules.description: Only residents of Puducherry Union Territory (including Karaikal, Mahe, Yanam) are eligible
Valid Puducherry resident certificate is mandatory for enrollment. Must prove domicile in Puducherry UT.
Families with annual income above Rs 5 lakh are not eligible for CMCHIS Puducherry
Families already covered under CGHS or ESIC are excluded from CMCHIS Puducherry
Only 1,027 listed procedures are covered. Procedures outside this approved list are not covered under the scheme.
Pre-existing conditions may have a waiting period before coverage activates

family_criteria.family_definition: Family of up to 5 members as listed on ration card. Family includes head of family, spouse, and up to 3 dependent children. Additional members may be covered on case-by-case basis.

covered_procedures: Cardiology (bypass surgery, angioplasty, valve replacement, pacemaker)
Orthopaedic (knee replacement, hip replacement, spinal surgery)
Diagnostics and lab tests during hospitalization
excluded_procedures: Dental treatment (unless related to covered surgery)
Procedures not in the 1,027 approved list

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Required for identity verification and e-KYC

required_documents.name: Ration Card
required_documents.notes: Used to verify family members and economic status. BPL ration card holders get free enrollment.

required_documents.name: Puducherry Resident Certificate
alternatives: Voter ID Card with Puducherry address
required_documents.notes: Mandatory proof of residence in Puducherry UT. Issued by Revenue Department.

required_documents.name: Income Certificate
required_documents.notes: Required for families claiming income below Rs 72,000 for free enrollment. Issued by Revenue Department.

required_documents.name: Mobile Number
required_documents.notes: For OTP verification and scheme communication

enrollment_steps: Step 1: Visit the nearest empanelled hospital, PHC, ration shop, or CMCHIS enrollment camp with required documents.
Step 2: Submit Aadhaar card, ration card, Puducherry resident certificate, and photograph.
Step 3: For families with income below Rs 72,000: submit income certificate for free enrollment.
Step 4: Undergo biometric verification (fingerprint/iris scan) for e-KYC.
Step 5: CMCHIS smart card is generated with enrolled family member details (up to 5 members).
Step 6: Card is activated. Present at any empanelled hospital in Puducherry for cashless treatment up to Rs 5 lakh.
Step 7: For critical procedures, hospital seeks pre-authorization. Treatment is cashless upon approval.
description_for_embedding: Chief Minister's Comprehensive Health Insurance Scheme (CMCHIS) Puducherry is the Union Territory's health insurance scheme providing Rs 5 lakh per family per year, modelled after Tamil Nadu's CMCHIS. The scheme covers 1,027 medical and surgical procedures across secondary and tertiary care at empanelled hospitals. All Puducherry residents are eligible, with priority for BPL families. Families with income below Rs 72,000 per year get free enrollment. The scheme covers Puducherry, Karaikal, Mahe, and Yanam regions. Enrollment is through empanelled hospitals, PHCs, and ration shops with Aadhaar, ration card, and resident certificate. Similar to TN CMCHIS in coverage and structure.
